examples.title: Algorithm: Create Cookie
examples.description: Create a new cookie with name and value
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateCookie
INPUT: name, value
OUTPUT: cookie

BEGIN
 cookie = new Cookie(name, value)
 RETURN cookie
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of creating a cookie
